title: Small UI/UX optimisation on board title
excerpt:
Hi all, some of our boards look quite a lot like each other and when scrolling down it is hard to recognise on which board you are (when the left pane is closed). 
I would love a small optimisation on the top of the boar…

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, some of our boards look quite a lot like each other and when scrolling down it is hard to recognise on which board you are (when the left pane is closed).
I would love a small optimisation on the top of the board namely keeping the main title of the board always visible (just above the group title).

Small tweak, lots of joy

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello.
in addition to this, i think every top icon must float when you scrolling down (search, filters, all of it).

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
hlopezvc:

every top icon must float when you scrolling down (search, filters, all of it).

Agreed.

Everything from the Group name and above should be frozen and visible when scrolling down the page.
